BO >fO - 201307 ['t!il. ~- s,1,2010-<f<ff, m-1 J t ~ ~)~)q.,, • w:lq -- 3 of 6 -- 4 THE GAZETIE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY MINISTRY OF MINORITY AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 12thMay,2011 [PAKf II-SEC. 3(ii)] S.0.1027(E).- In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) and (2) of Section 9 of the Wakf Act, 1995 (43 of 1995) read with Rule 4 of the Central WakfRules, 1998, and in supersession of the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Minority Affairs number S.O. 333 (E), dated the 181 h March, 2005, except as respects things done or omitted to : be done before such supersession, the Central Government hereby re-constitutes and for the said purpose appoints the following as Chairperson and members to the Central Wakf Council, established by notification of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Welfare number S.O. 464 (E), dated 26th June, 1997 and re-constituted vide notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment number S.O. 492 (E), dated the 2"d May, 2003, for a period of five years, from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette, namely:- Union Minister in charge ofWakfs Chairperson. Members appointed under sub-clause (i) of clause (b) of sub-section (2) of Section 9: I. Shri Shakil Ahmad Syed, Madni Hall, Jamiat Ulema-i-Hind No. I, Bahadur Shah Zafar Marg, New Delhi - 110002. 2. Shri Farook Mahmood, Hon. Secretary, Al-Amin-Education Society (Banglore) Hosur Road, Near Lal Bagh Road, Main Gate, Banglore-560027. 3. Janab Maulana Mohd. Wali Rahmani, Secretary, All India Muslim Personal Law Board 76Afl, Main Market, Okhla, Jamia Nagar, New Delhi-110025. -- 4 of 6 -- ['WT II-~ 3(ii)] Members appointed under sub-clause (ii) of clause (b) of sub-section (2) of Section 9: 1. Shri Mohammad Rizwan Ansari Viii-Pure Gulab, P.O. Gopiganj, Sant Ravidas Nagar, Bhadohi, U.P. -221303. 2. Shri Yusuff Ali M.A. Emke Mansion 1, Nattika, Trissur Dist., Kerala. 3. Smt. Yasmin Ahmed, I.A.S (Retd.), Golden Chateau, B/21, 6th Street, Ground Floor, Anna Nagar East, Chennai, Tamil Nadu-600102. 4. Professor (Dr.) Qamar Rahman 3, Guizar Colony, Clyde Road, Lucknow, U.P-226 001. Members appointed under sub-clause (iii) of clause (b) of sub-section (2) of Section 9: 1. Shri E.T. Mohammed Basheer, MP (Lok Sabha) B-601, M.S. Flats, B.K.S Marg, New Delhi-110001. 2. Shri Syed Shahnawaz Hussain, MP (Lok Sabha) 7, Pandit Pant Marg, New Delhi-110001. 3. Prof. Saif-ud-Din Soz, MP (Rajya Sabha) 12, Akbar Road, New Delhi 110001. Members appointed under sub-clause (iv) of clause (b) of sub-section (2) of Section 9: 1. Shri Syed Gulam Afzal Biabani alias Khusro Pasha, Chairman, Andhra Pradesh State WakfBoard, Razzak Manzi!, Haj House Building, Opp. Public Gardens, Nampally, Hyderabad, Andhra Pradesh- 500 001. 2. Shri Tariq Anwar, Member of Parliament (Raj ya Sabha) and Presiding Chairperson, Maharashtra State Board ofWakfs, Panchakki, Aurangabad, Maharashtra - 431 002. I &a~ ~-alU-:i. 5 -- 5 of 6 -- 6 UIE GAZETIE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PAKT II-Sec. 3(ii)] Members appointed under sub-clause (v) of clause (b) of sub-section (2) of Section 9: 1. Justice S. Haider Abbas Raza, Former Senior Judge of Lucknow Bench of High Court at Allahabad D-3, Shalimar Imperial, Gokhle Marg, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh. Members appointed under sub-clause (vi) of clause (b) of sub-section (2) of Section 9: I. Shri M. Iqbal A. Shaikh G/2 Silver Palace, Near Le Meriden Hotel, Beside B.M.C Bank, • Khanpur, Ahmedabad, Gujarat-380001. Members appointed under sub-clause (vii) of clause (b) of sub-section (2) of Section 9: 1. Dr. Syed Shah Khusro Hussaini, Sajjada Nashin, Dargah Hazrat Khaja Banda Nawaz (Rh), Gulbarga, Karnataka-585104. Members appointed under sub-clause (viii) of clause (b) of sub-section (2) of Section 9: I.
